content.subject: T123: Schema-ordered to_filename()
content.description: Fix BIDSPath.to_filename() in _types.py to accept schema and emit entities in schema order. Add test.

content.subject: T032: Sources merge mixed-type fix
content.description: Fix _apply_field_rename Sources merge for mixed string/array types and 3-way BasedOn + RawSources + existing Sources merge. Add tests.

content.subject: T105: DCOffsetCorrection → SoftwareFilters
content.description: Register structural migration rule moving DCOffsetCorrection into SoftwareFilters dict. Add tests for standalone and merged cases.

content.subject: T036: ScanDate move creates _scans.tsv
content.description: Fix _apply_scandate_move to create _scans.tsv with headers if missing, avoid data loss. Add test.

content.subject: T124: _is_bids_data_entry helper
content.description: Add helper, replace `not path.is_dir()` filters across session/subject/run/split/merge/_sidecars/migrate. Add .ds dir test.

content.subject: T125: Document migration test matrix
content.description: Add header comment to tests/test_migrate.py documenting which rules have bids-examples coverage vs synthetic fixtures.

content.description: Run tox and verify all envs pass before reporting completion.

content.text:
All 6 tasks complete:

- **T123** (`src/bids_utils/_types.py`, `tests/test_types.py`) — `BIDSPath.to_filename()` now accepts a `schema` kwarg and reorders entities via `BIDSSchema.entity_order()`; `to_relative_path()` passes through. Added schema-order and insertion-order tests.
- **T032** (`src/bids_utils/migrate.py`, `tests/test_migrate.py`) — `_apply_field_rename` now normalizes both sides to lists, fixing mixed string/array merges. Added mixed-type and 3-way merge tests (BasedOn + RawSources + existing Sources).
- **T105** (`src/bids_utils/migrate.py`, `tests/test_migrate.py`) — Replaced `field_removal_DCOffsetCorrection` with `dcoffset_to_softwarefilters` (level=safe, category=`field_nest`, iEEG-scoped). Added scanner/applier that nests `DCOffsetCorrection` under `SoftwareFilters[DCOffsetCorrection].description`, preserving existing SoftwareFilters dict. Updated two level-tier tests to use HardcopyDeviceSoftwareVersion as the advisory exemplar.
- **T036** (`src/bids_utils/migrate.py`, `tests/test_migrate.py`) — `_apply_scandate_move` now creates `_scans.tsv` (with `filename`/`acq_time` headers) at the conventional subject/session location when missing, resolving the real data-file entry via sibling lookup. Added missing-`_scans.tsv` tests for subject- and session-level cases.
- **T124** (`src/bids_utils/_types.py` and 6 callers) — Added `_is_bids_data_entry()`; replaced `is_bids_dir_file(f) or not f.is_dir()` call sites in `subject.py`, `session.py`, `run.py`, `split.py`, `_sidecars.py`, `migrate.py`. Added `.ds`-directory helper tests plus an end-to-end `rename_subject` test that renames a CTF MEG `.ds` directory.
- **T125** (`tests/test_migrate.py`) — Added header comment documenting which rules have bids-examples coverage vs. synthetic fixtures.

Tasks marked `[X]` in `tasks.md`. Full `tox` (py310–py314, lint, type, duplication) green.

content.text: All six tasks are already implemented and committed to the working tree from the previous run. Let me verify the state is still clean.

content.content:
- [X] T123 [US1] Fix `BIDSPath.to_filename()` in `src/bids_utils/_types.py` to emit entities in schema-defined order (FR-035). When a `BIDSSchema` is available, `to_filename()` MUST reorder entities according to `BIDSSchema.entity_order()` before assembling the filename. Without a schema, preserve insertion order (best-effort). Add test in `tests/test_types.py`: `BIDSPath(entities={"sub":"01","task":"rest","run":"99","recording":"bipolar"}).to_filename(schema=...)` produces entities in schema order, not insertion order.
- [X] T032 [US2] Implement metadata field rename handler: `BasedOn` → `Sources`, `RawSources` → `Sources`. Merge logic MUST handle: (a) existing `Sources` as string + incoming value as array (normalize to array first), (b) both `BasedOn` AND `RawSources` present alongside existing `Sources` (3-way merge). Add tests for mixed-type merge and 3-way merge scenarios. (Note: `ScanDate` handled by T036; `DCOffsetCorrection` by T105; `AcquisitionDuration` by T104.) *(Reimplementation needed: current merge logic broken for mixed string/array types.)*
- [X] T036 [US2] Implement cross-file move handler: `ScanDate` from JSON sidecar → `acq_time` column in `_scans.tsv`. MUST create `_scans.tsv` with appropriate headers if it does not exist — current implementation silently skips the TSV write when the file is missing, causing data loss (`ScanDate` removed from JSON but never written to TSV). Add test for missing-`_scans.tsv` scenario. *(Reimplementation needed: data loss bug.)*
- [X] T125 [US2] Document migration rule test matrix in `tests/test_migrate.py` header comment: which rules have bids-examples test data (`IntendedFor`, `AssociatedEmptyRoom`, `ElektaNeuromag`, `SoftwareFilters`, `RawSources`, `DatasetDOI`, `AcquisitionDuration`) vs. which need synthetic fixtures (`DCOffsetCorrection`, `BasedOn`, `ScanDate`, `HardcopyDeviceSoftwareVersion`, `_phase` suffix, `"89+"` age, `fsaverage3-6`/`fsaveragesym`/`UNCInfant` templates). Ensure T038 tests cover both categories.
- [X] T105 [P] [US2] Register `DCOffsetCorrection` → `SoftwareFilters` structural migration rule in `src/bids_utils/migrate.py` (FR-031). Level: `safe`. Scope: iEEG sidecars. Handler: move `DCOffsetCorrection` value into `"SoftwareFilters": {"DCOffsetCorrection": {"description": VALUE}}`; merge into existing `SoftwareFilters` dict if present; remove original `DCOffsetCorrection` field. Add tests for: standalone DCOffsetCorrection, DCOffsetCorrection with pre-existing SoftwareFilters dict. *(Reimplementation needed: current code removes field instead of migrating to SoftwareFilters.)*
- [X] T124 [US4,US5] Implement `_is_bids_data_entry(path: Path) -> bool` helper in `src/bids_utils/_types.py` (FR-036). Returns `True` for: (a) regular files, (b) symlinks (annexed files per FR-023), (c) directories matching BIDS data directory patterns (`.ds`, `.zarr`, `.ome.zarr`). Replace all `not path.is_dir()` file iteration filters (introduced by T092) with `_is_bids_data_entry()` in: `session.py`, `subject.py`, `run.py`, `split.py`, `merge.py`, `_sidecars.py`, `migrate.py`. Add test with mock `.ds` directory — verify it is included in rename operations.

file.content:
Spec analysis: fix 6 migration handler specs, add 3 new tasks

Cross-artifact consistency analysis (/speckit.analyze) identified
critical issues in migration handler specifications, verified against
real-world bids-examples data and the actual implementation.

Spec fixes:
- FR-031: DCOffsetCorrection is a structural migration into
  SoftwareFilters dict (not field removal) per bids-specification #799
- FR-030: Downgrade --mode=interactive from MUST to SHOULD (post-MVP)
- FR-032: Decouple from FR-031, now standalone removal with advisory note
- library-api.md: Add reconcile_metadata param to merge_datasets()

Task status corrections (re-opened for reimplementation):
- T032 [ ]: BasedOn/RawSources→Sources merge broken for mixed types
- T036 [ ]: ScanDate handler silently loses data when _scans.tsv missing
- T105 [ ]: Implements removal instead of SoftwareFilters migration
- T103: deferred → post-MVP

New tasks from coverage gaps:
- T123: FR-035 entity ordering in BIDSPath.to_filename()
- T124: FR-036 BIDS directory data files (.ds, .zarr, .ome.zarr)
- T125: Migration rule test matrix (bids-examples vs synthetic)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code 2.1.114 / Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  string/array merges and enabling 3-way BasedOn + RawSources + existing
  Sources consolidation.

  at the conventional subject/session location when missing, so

- T124: Add _is_bids_data_entry() in _types.py covering files,
  symlinks, and BIDS dir-files (.ds/.zarr/.ome.zarr). Replace the
  equivalent inline filters in session/subject/run/split/_sidecars/
  migrate with the helper.
- T125: Document the migration rule test matrix (bids-examples-backed
  vs synthetic fixtures) in the tests/test_migrate.py header.

Tests added for every fix (schema-ordered filenames, mixed/3-way
Sources merges, DCOffsetCorrection standalone and merged-into-existing
SoftwareFilters, ScanDate creating _scans.tsv for sub- and ses-level,
.ds directory included in rename_subject). Full tox (py310-py314, lint,
type, duplication) green.
